Generative Urbanism

Generative AI for Cities

Context
Generative AI for Cities
Links
LinkedIn Post Project Page

Early design phases can benefit from rapid iteration and visualization loops. New generative AI models can accelerate visualization tasks and allow near real-time design feedback. Using ControlNet and Three.js, we generate real-time 360-degree panoramic views of new urban development in the browser.

Ariel Noyman

City Science Center, MIT Media Lab noyman [at] mit [dot] edu 75 Amherst Street, Cambridge, MA 02139
